title: Iran 'sleeper cells' in US: What Trump said when asked how many there could be
summary_full: In the backdrop of escalating military action against Iran, President Trump disclosed the existence of Iranian sleeper cells operating on US soil. He placed the blame for potential breaches in border security squarely on the policies of former President Biden. Recent interceptions of encrypted communications from Iran have led to a surge in monitoring efforts and elevated counterterrorism alerts nationwide.
